title: Action
description: Messages sent from the frontend to the backend to trigger in-game actions.

oneOf.title: SetWaypoint
oneOf.description: Sets a compass waypoint on an exterior map marker without fast-travelling.

markerID.description: Form ID of the TESObjectREFR map marker.

oneOf.title: FastTravel
oneOf.description: Fast-travels to an exterior map marker (only available when fast travel is allowed).

oneOf.title: Equip
oneOf.description: Equips a weapon or piece of armor from the player's inventory.

formID.description: Form ID of the TESBoundObject to equip.

oneOf.title: Unequip
oneOf.description: Unequips a weapon or piece of armor.

oneOf.title: Consume
oneOf.description: Consumes a food, drink, or medicine item from the player's inventory.

formID.description: Form ID of the AlchemyItem to consume.
